name: Aszalymonitoring - Drought Monitoring System
dataType: Soil moisture, Hungarian Drought Index (HDI), hydrometeorological station data
description: Operational drought and water scarcity monitoring system with 114+ stations measuring soil moisture at multiple depths and computing the Hungarian Drought Index (HDI).

name: Mapire / Arcanum Historical Maps
dataType: Georeferenced historical maps: 1st/2nd/3rd military surveys, cadastral maps, 1941 military map
description: Georeferenced historical military survey maps (1st 1782-85, 2nd 1819-69, 3rd 1869-87) and cadastral maps of the Habsburg Empire/Hungary, viewable online with overlay capability.

name: TeIR - Territorial Information System
dataType: Socioeconomic, demographic, infrastructure, environment statistics by territory
description: National territorial development and spatial planning information system aggregating data from ~20 data providers across 50+ topic areas for all Hungarian settlements.

name: OGRe - Geothermal Information Platform
dataType: Geothermal maps, thermal well data (1695 wells), hydrocarbon wells (8996), deep boreholes (12539)
description: Interactive geothermal information platform with detailed thermal well data, hydrocarbon well locations, deep boreholes, and thematic geological/geophysical maps supporting geothermal project development.

name: SZTFH Borehole Map (Furaspont Terkep)
dataType: Borehole locations, engineering soundings, CPT data, 3D seismic surveys
description: Digital map of over 300,000 borehole locations from the Geobank database, including engineering soundings, cone penetration tests, and 3D seismic measurement locations across Hungary.

name: SZTFH Geological Map Server
dataType: Surface geology, hydrogeology, geophysics, geochemistry, geothermal thematic maps
description: Central map server hosting all geological, hydrogeological, geophysical, geochemical, and geothermal thematic maps of Hungary through an interactive web viewer with OGC-compliant services.

name: NBmR - National Biodiversity Monitoring System
dataType: Species populations, community diversity, habitats, landscape biodiversity data
description: Hungary's standardized national biodiversity observation system monitoring species populations, community diversity, habitats, and landscapes, with two decades of data used for Natura 2000 designation.

name: MME Bird Atlas & Bird Database
dataType: Bird species distribution, population dynamics, ringing data, 30M+ occurrence records
description: Comprehensive bird atlas of Hungary covering 420 species with 30 million data records, 1700 distribution maps, and continuously updated monitoring and ringing centre databases.

name: Vadonleso - Citizen Science Nature Observation
dataType: Citizen observations of 18 protected plant and animal species
formats: web map (Google Maps based), mobile app
description: National citizen science platform where volunteers record sightings of 18 protected species on a map-based interface, contributing to Hungary's biodiversity database.

name: META Programme - Vegetation Heritage Map
dataType: Habitat types, vegetation cover, naturalness, landscape ecological indices
description: Complete field-based vegetation survey of Hungary (93,000 km2) in 35-hectare hexagonal grid cells, mapping natural and semi-natural habitats with ~200 contributing botanists.

name: TIM - Soil Protection Information & Monitoring
dataType: Soil chemistry, physical properties, contamination at ~1200 points, 3 depth levels
description: National soil monitoring network with ~1200 sampling points measured annually at three depth levels (0-30, 30-60, 60-90 cm), operated since 1992 by NEBIH laboratories.

name: DOSoReMI - Digital Soil Maps of Hungary
dataType: Soil property maps, soil type maps, functional soil maps (texture, pH, organic carbon, etc.)
description: National digital soil mapping infrastructure providing soil property, soil type, and functional maps at 100 m resolution as Hungary's implementation of GlobalSoilMap.

name: Kovesligethy Rado Seismological Observatory
dataType: Real-time seismograms, earthquake catalog, seismo-acoustic bulletin, waveform data
description: Hungary's national seismological network with real-time earthquake detection, open-access waveform data via FDSN/GEOFON, and a comprehensive historical and contemporary earthquake catalog.

name: OSJER - National Radiation Monitoring System
dataType: Continuous gamma dose rate measurements from 130+ remote stations
description: National radiation monitoring network with 130+ stations continuously measuring environmental gamma background dose rates, feeding data to the EU EURDEP platform.

name: OKIR - National Environmental Information System
operator: Ministry of Agriculture / Ministry of Energy Affairs
dataType: Waste management, air emissions (LAIR), water quality, nature conservation, E-PRTR
description: Centralized environmental data portal covering waste management, air pollutant emissions (LAIR), surface/groundwater quality, nature conservation, and E-PRTR industrial facility data.

name: FORESEE Climate Database
dataType: Daily temperature, precipitation, solar radiation, vapor pressure deficit (observed + projected)
description: Open-access climatological database providing seamlessly combined historical and projected daily meteorological data for Central Europe, with FORESEE-HUN v1.0 specifically for Hungary.

name: Hungarian National Forest Inventory (NFI)
dataType: Forest area, growing stock, tree species composition, forest health statistics
description: Systematic national forest inventory with two completed 5-year survey cycles since 2010, providing detailed statistics on forest area, growing stock, species composition, and health.

name: NEBIH - National Food Chain Safety Office Portal
dataType: Plant protection records, food safety registers, feed controls, soil protection data
formats: web portal, eGN electronic farming log
description: Integrated food chain safety authority portal with electronic farming log (eGN), plant protection treatment records, food/feed business operator registries, and soil protection data.

name: Magyar Kozut - National Road Databank
dataType: Road network data, traffic counts, road condition, bridge inventory
description: State-owned enterprise managing the National Road Databank for Hungary's ~31,000 km public road network including road attributes, traffic data, and bridge inventory.

name: HUN-REN ARP Research Data Repository
dataType: Multi-domain research datasets including geospatial, environmental, earth science data
description: National federated research data repository for Hungarian research with 211 dataverses and 34,000+ files, supporting FAIR data principles and integrated with European Open Science Cloud.

name: SZTFH INSPIRE Geonetwork Catalog
dataType: INSPIRE-compliant metadata catalog for geological, hydrogeological, geophysical datasets
description: INSPIRE-compliant metadata catalog providing discovery and access to Hungarian geological, hydrogeological, and geophysical spatial datasets via standardized OGC services.

name: KSH STADAT - Statistical Data Tables
dataType: Demographic, economic, environmental, agricultural, meteorological statistics by region
description: Hungary's central statistics office providing comprehensive socioeconomic, environmental, and meteorological statistical data tables at multiple spatial and temporal resolutions.

name: HungaroMet Agrometeorological Service
dataType: Drought indices, soil moisture, vegetation status, frost warnings, agricultural weather
description: Agrometeorological information portal providing drought indices (Palmer, SPI), soil moisture maps, vegetation conditions, and frost/heat warnings for Hungarian agriculture.

name: NAK - Hungarian Chamber of Agriculture Data
dataType: Agricultural production statistics, farm advisory data, water management, market prices
description: National agricultural chamber portal with production statistics, crop advisory information, water management guidance, market price data, and the agricultural producer registry.

name: Balaton LTSER - Long-Term Ecological Research
dataType: Water quality, chlorophyll-a, phytoplankton, sediment, temperature, ecological data
description: Long-term socio-ecological research platform for Lake Balaton covering water quality, biodiversity, food web interactions, and sediment monitoring of Europe's largest shallow lake.
